response.original_title: Michael Jackson: History, the King of Pop
response.overview: In this official documentary, we gain a unique insight into the man who was both recluse and brilliant global showman. With archive footage showing the highs and lows of his career, his relationships with Elizabeth Taylor, Princess Di, Lisa Marie Presley and a host of memories, this program is a celebration of a superstar who shaped modern music for a generation.
response.title: Michael Jackson: History, the King of Pop
